name: Handover & commissioning (ZOS + commissioning act)
description: Object handover and acceptance: ZOS (compliance conclusion from state construction supervision), commissioning act / occupancy permit (art.55 of the Town Planning Code of the Russian Federation), the agreed defects list and the as-built dossier. The technical customer accepts handover once fire-safety and fit-out are done; the acceptance triggers the retention release (the handover line itself is lump 0). Building-level scope (zone=BLDG).

evidence.description: Compliance conclusion (ZOS) from the state construction supervision authority.
Occupancy permit / commissioning act for the object (art.55 of the Town Planning Code of the Russian Federation).
Punch list / defects list agreed by the parties.
As-built dossier (full set) — the as-built dossier.

checks.description: Handover needs the ZOS, the commissioning act, the defects list and the dossier.
Commissioning date is within the project window.

consequences.description: Handover (behind fire-safety + ZOS) unlocks the retention release — no new earned-value line, the act itself triggers the release.
Customer takes ownership and operating liability of the object.
